scripts.lint:check: grep -rn "schema\[.*\"" src/ && echo "ERROR: bracket-access on schema!" && exit 1; grep -rn "TABLES\[.*\"" src/ && echo "ERROR: bracket-access on TABLES!" && exit 1; grep -rn "\.where(\s*(\s*\w+\s*,\s*{" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v whereEq | grep -v whereAnd | grep -v __tests__ | grep -v ".d.ts" && echo "ERROR: raw .where((c,{eq}) destructure — use whereEq!" && exit 1; echo "OK: all patterns clean"
scripts.test: npx tsx src/__tests__/middleware.test.ts && npx tsx src/__tests__/invariant.test.ts
